meta.title: DESIGN VERIFICATION TEST
meta.subtitle: <Sub-title — what this unit is>
meta.descriptor: <One-line descriptor of the test procedure / bench>
meta.creator: <Owner / department>

coverRows.label: Release Gate
coverRows.value: <How this DVT gates release; reference to Appendix B and any external-ref sections>

coverRows.label: Format
coverRows.value: Contents page (clickable TOC) immediately after cover. External-reference sections (if any) precede internal test sections. Tester records measurement in Measure column. Field refresh (Word: Ctrl+A → F9; LibreOffice: Tools → Update → Fields) updates page numbers and TOC P/F mirror. Elaborations in Appendix C. Equipment in Appendix A. Release-gate matrix in Appendix B.

knownIssues.heading: Known Issues
knownIssues.intro: <Optional: rationale for keeping these xfails until the underlying defects are fixed>

externalRefs.title: <External DVT name>
externalRefs.intro: <Why this is referenced and not repeated here>
externalRefs.passCriteria: <What counts as Section A passing — usually a signed copy of the external DVT attached>

appendixA.heading: Appendix A — Equipment
appendixA.intro: All test equipment, fixtures, and instrumentation referenced from test rows.

appendixB.heading: Appendix B — Release-Gate Matrix
appendixB.intro: Change severity mapping to required DVT sections. Straw-man — refine with stakeholders before treated as authoritative.

appendixC.heading: Appendix C — Elaborations and Rationale
appendixC.intro: Context and rationale referenced by Brief column. Listed by table reference or topic.

_schema_note_steps: Each test row. Two styles supported: (a) legacy `ref: 'C.1'` — explicit letter; (b) preferred `section: <code>, subref: '1'` — script computes the letter from section position. The preferred style survives section reordering without edits. measure stays empty — tester writes in.

steps.brief: <Imperative-voice 1-sentence action. Cross-ref another step with [other_code.1.1]. Cross-ref a section with [other_code].>

_schema_note_sections: Each entry renders as its own section page. `code` is a stable symbolic name used by step `section` and by [code]/[code.subref] cross-ref tokens. Letter is assigned by array position (after externalRefs) — reorder this array to renumber, no other edits needed. `id` field is back-compat only.

sections.name: <Section name>
sections.intro: <Optional 1-2 sentence intro shown beneath the section heading>

_schema_note_knownIssues: Rows of the Known-Issues table immediately after the cover. Omit the whole array if not applicable.
_schema_note_elaborations: Long-form notes for Appendix C, indexed by ref (label).
_schema_note_equipment: Rows of the Equipment table in Appendix A.
_schema_note_releaseGate: categories drives Appendix B.1. matrix drives Appendix B.2 (cells array length must match meta.appendixB.matrixHeaders).
